---
# {{ site.title }} — Full Content

> {{ site.description | strip_newlines | strip }}

This file contains the full text of every blog post, concatenated for LLM and AI
assistant consumption. Source: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}
Index: {{ '/llms.txt' | absolute_url }}
{% for post in site.posts %}
================================================================================

# {{ post.title | strip }}

URL: {{ post.url | absolute_url }}
Date: {{ post.date | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }}
{% if post.categories.size > 0 %}Categories: {{ post.categories | join: ", " }}
{% endif %}{% if post.tags.size > 0 %}Tags: {{ post.tags | join: ", " }}
{% endif %}
{{ post.content | strip_html | strip }}
{% endfor %}
